channel.title: Algorithm on Wen-Yi, Lo
channel.description: Recent content in Algorithm on Wen-Yi, Lo

item.title: Balanced Tree !
item.description: Height (Confusing) Height of Tree (counts the node from root) 從目前Root(含root)的點+一路數到最深的leaf Height of node (counts the edge which selected the node then go down lowest leaf along paths) 從你選的Node一路計算到最深的leaf的"edge"的數量 Depth (current Node how far from root) 從目前Node 數回最上層root的edge數量

item.title: Master method
item.description: Motivation Using this tool can help us to analyze the recursion problem, divided and conquer to find who is quicker! We care about more upper bound -> big oh Recursion algorithm T(1) -> base case n>1 T(n)<= aT(n/b)+O(what) Master method (Master theorem) Assumption black box for solving recurrences. All subproblems have equal size. ex merge sort 每個都分成n/2 如果有不同size的recursion call 就要用別的方法 不是master method Base case T(n)<= a constant for all sufficiently small n For all larger n -> T(n) <= aT(n/b)+O(n^d)

item.title: Karatsuba Algorithm(multiply two num)
item.description: brief intro The following image is from coursera’s course which is called Divided And Conquer opened from Stanford University. n = digit a, b = (digit_1)[0..n/2], (digit_1)[n/2..] c, d = (digit_2)[0..n/2], (digit_2)[n/2..] intro 把上述的數字分成a,b,c,d後進行下列公式運算 我的猜測(但有誤) 麻煩是在如何計算結果 ex. 123*26 a = 12, b =3 c = 2, d = 6 a*c 後面幾顆 0 = b*c的位數 所以b*c = (int)log(18)+1 = 2 so a*c = 2400 3)-2)-1) 的這步運算要到幾位數 = (int)log(a*c) = round(log(2400)) = 3(need 3 digit)
